oblige.example: I feel obliged to help my neighbor.
oblige.example_zh: 我覺得有義務幫助我的鄰居。

obstinate.example: The obstinate child refused to move.
obstinate.example_zh: 那個固執的孩子就是不肯走。

occurrence.example: Snow is a rare occurrence here.

octopus.example: An octopus has eight long arms.
octopus.example_zh: 章魚有八條長長的腕足。

odor.example: A strong odor came from the kitchen.
odor.example_zh: 廚房傳來一股濃濃的氣味。

offshore.example_zh: 他們建造了離岸風力發電機。

operative.example: The new rule is now operative.

oppress.example: The cruel ruler oppressed the people.
oppress.example_zh: 殘暴的統治者壓迫人民。

oppression.example: They fought against years of oppression.

ordeal.example: The long illness was a real ordeal.
ordeal.example_zh: 這場久病真是一大折磨。

orderly.example: The students left the room in an orderly way.
orderly.example_zh: 學生們有秩序地離開教室。

organizer.example_zh: 活動主辦人規劃了一切。

orient.example: She used a map to orient herself.
orient.example_zh: 她用地圖辨明自己的方位。

oriental.example: The room was decorated in an oriental style.
oriental.example_zh: 這個房間以東方風格裝飾。

originate.example: Tea is said to originate in China.

ornament.example: She hung an ornament on the tree.
ornament.example_zh: 她在樹上掛了一個裝飾品。

orphanage.example: They donated toys to the orphanage.

orthodox.example_zh: 他採用傳統的教學方法。

ounce.example: Add an ounce of sugar to the mix.
ounce.example_zh: 在混合物裡加一盎司糖。

outbreak.example: There was an outbreak of flu at school.

outing.example: We went on a family outing to the zoo.
outing.example_zh: 我們全家去動物園郊遊。

outlaw.example: The new law will outlaw smoking indoors.
outlaw.example_zh: 這項新法律將禁止室內吸菸。

outlaw.example: The story is about a famous outlaw.
outlaw.example_zh: 這個故事講的是一名著名的逃犯。

outlook.example: She has a positive outlook on life.
outlook.example_zh: 她對人生抱持正向的態度。

outnumber.example: The girls outnumber the boys in this class.
outnumber.example_zh: 這個班的女生人數多於男生。

outrage.example: The unfair decision caused public outrage.
outrage.example_zh: 這個不公的決定引起了公憤。

outrageous.example: The price of the ticket was outrageous.

outright.example_zh: 她當場回絕了這個提議。

outset.example: She knew the risks from the outset.
outset.example_zh: 她從一開始就知道風險。

outskirts.example: They live on the outskirts of the city.

outward.example: Her outward calm hid her worry.
outward.example_zh: 她表面的平靜掩蓋了內心的擔憂。

overdo.example: Don't overdo the exercise on your first day.

overflow.example: The river began to overflow its banks.
There was an overflow of water on the floor.

overhear.example: I happened to overhear their plan.
overhear.example_zh: 我碰巧聽到了他們的計畫。

overlap.example: The two meetings overlap in time.
overlap.example_zh: 這兩場會議的時間重疊了。

overlap.example: There is some overlap between the jobs.
overlap.example_zh: 這些工作之間有部分重疊。

oyster.example: She found a pearl inside the oyster.
oyster.example_zh: 她在牡蠣裡發現了一顆珍珠。

ozone.example: The ozone layer protects us from the sun.
ozone.example_zh: 臭氧層保護我們免受太陽傷害。

packet.example: She opened a packet of crackers.

paddle.example: He used a paddle to move the canoe.
We paddled the boat across the lake.

paperback.example: I bought a cheap paperback at the station.
paperback.example_zh: 我在車站買了一本便宜的平裝書。

paradox.example: It is a paradox that less can be more.
paradox.example_zh: 少即是多是個耐人尋味的悖論。

paralyze.example_zh: 這場意外使他雙腿癱瘓。

patriot.example: The patriot served his country proudly.
patriot.example_zh: 這名愛國者自豪地為國效力。

patriotic.example_zh: 他們唱了一首愛國歌曲。

peacock.example: The peacock spread its colorful tail.
peacock.example_zh: 孔雀展開了牠色彩繽紛的尾羽。

pebble.example: He skipped a pebble across the pond.
pebble.example_zh: 他讓一顆小石子在池面上彈跳。

peek.example: She took a peek inside the box.
peek.example_zh: 她偷瞄了盒子裡面一眼。

peek.example: He had a quick peek at the answer.
peek.example_zh: 他飛快地偷看了一眼答案。

peninsula.example: The town sits on a narrow peninsula.
peninsula.example_zh: 這個小鎮位於一個狹長的半島上。

perch.example: A bird perched on the wire.
The cat watched from its perch.

peril.example: The sailors were in great peril during the storm.
peril.example_zh: 暴風雨中水手們身陷險境。

perish.example: Many plants perished in the cold.
perish.example_zh: 許多植物在寒冷中枯死了。

permissible.example: It is not permissible to park here.

persevere.example_zh: 儘管屢次失敗，她仍堅持不懈。
